# New Epics to Implement

## Table With Disconnected Headers

In epic 111, you separated the table headers from the scrollable body to fix the janky scrolling issue. This is a good first pass. However, there are several issues with the current implementation:

- When I shrink the screen so that the window is narrower than the table, the scrollbar initially shows up on the far right, like it should, but when I scroll to the right, the vertical scrollbar scrolls with the table content instead of staying fixed on the right edge of the screen.
- Similarly, if I look at a screen that is wider than the table, the vertical scrollbar is to the immediate right of the table not on the far right of the area the table has available to expand into.
- Finally, before this change, when I had content that took up less space than the full width, the columns were spread out to fill the available space. How the columns are sized to fit the width of the content. I wouldn't mind that so much if the black content beyond the table was the same color as the cell background.

## Universe Sticky Sort

I'm not sure why or under what circumstances, but the sticky sort for the Universe screen seems to vanish and I have to resort.
